    intro n hn
    have hn' : 1 ≤ n ∧ n ≤ 1988 := Finset.mem_Icc.mp hn
    clear hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ihn
    cases' n with n
    · simp_all
    · cases' n with n
      · simp_all
      · cases' n % 2 with r
        · have : n = 2 * (n / 2) := by omega
          rw [this, h₃]
          · simp_all
          · omega
        · have : n = 2 * (n / 2) + 1 := by omega
          cases' (n / 2) % 2 with r'
          · have : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 1 := by omega
            rw [this, h₄]
            · simp_all
            · omega
          · have : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 3 := by omega
            rw [this, h₅]
            · simp_all
            · omega
    simp_all
  simp_all only [Finset.filter, Finset.card]
  exact rfl

have h : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 1988, f n = n ↔ n.digits 2 = n.digits 2.reverse ∧ n % 2 = 1 ∨ n = 1 := by
    intro n hn
    have hn' : 1 ≤ n ∧ n ≤ 1988 := Finset.mem_Icc.mp hn
    clear hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ihn
    cases' n with n
    · simp_all
    · cases' n with n
      · simp_all
      · cases' n % 2 with h_even
        · cases' n / 2 with m
          · simp_all
          · have h1 : f (2 * (m + 1)) = f (m + 1) := h₃ (m + 1) (by linarith)
            rw [h1]
            have h2 : (2 * (m + 1)).digits 2 = (m + 1).digits 2 ++ [0] := by
              simp [Nat.digits_add, Nat.digits_mul, Nat.digits_one]
            have h3 : (2 * (m + 1)).digits 2.reverse = 0 :: (m + 1).digits 2.reverse := by
              rw [h2]; simp
            simp_all
        · cases' n % 4 with h_mod
          · cases' n / 4 with m
            · simp_all
            · have h1 : f (4 * (m + 1) + 1) = 2 * f (2 * (m + 1) + 1) - f (m + 1) := h₄ (m + 1) (by linarith)
              rw [h1]
              have h2 : (4 * (m + 1) + 1).digits 2 = (m + 1).digits 2 ++ [0, 0, 1] := by
                simp [Nat.digits_add, Nat.digits_mul, Nat.digits_one]
              have h3 : (4 * (m + 1) + 1).digits 2.reverse = [1, 0, 0] ++ (m + 1).digits 2.reverse := by
                rw [h2]; simp
              simp_all
          · cases' n / 4 with m
            · simp_all
            · have h1 : f (4 * (m + 1) + 3) = 3 * f (2 * (m + 1) + 1) - 2 * f (m + 1) := h₅ (m + 1) (by linarith)
              rw [h1]
              have h2 : (4 * (m + 1) + 3).digits 2 = (m + 1).digits 2 ++ [1, 1, 1] := by
                simp [Nat.digits_add, Nat.digits_mul, Nat.digits_one]
              have h3 : (4 * (m + 1) + 3).digits 2.reverse = [1, 1, 1] ++ (m + 1).digits 2.reverse := by
                rw [h2]; simp
              simp_all
  simp_all only [Finset.filter, Finset.card]
  decide

have h : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 1988, f n = n ↔ n.digits 2 = List.reverse (n.digits 2) := by
    intro n hn
    have hn' : 1 ≤ n ∧ n ≤ 1988 := Finset.mem_Icc.mp hn
    clear hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ihn
    rcases hn' with ⟨hn1, hn2⟩
    cases' n with n
    · exfalso; linarith
    · cases' n with n
      · simp [h₁]
      · cases' n with n
        · simp [h₂]
        · cases' Nat.even_or_odd n.succ with hne hno
          · obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := hne
            simp_all [h₃, Nat.mul_succ]
            apply ihn
            constructor <;> omega
          · obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := hno
            cases' k with k
            · simp [h₂]
            · cases' Nat.even_or_odd k with hke hko
              · obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := hke
                simp_all [h₄, Nat.mul_succ, Nat.add_assoc]
                apply ihn
                constructor <;> omega
              · obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := hko
                simp_all [h₅, Nat.mul_succ, Nat.add_assoc]
                apply ihn
                constructor <;> omega
    simp_all [Nat.isPalindrome_iff_digits_eq_reverse]
  rw [Finset.card_filter]
  exact (by decide : (∑ n in Finset.Icc 1 1988, if (n.digits 2).reverse = n.digits 2 then 1 else 0) = 92)

have h₆ : ∀ n > 0, f n = n ↔ (∀ k, (Nat.digits 2 n).get? k = some 1 → k % 2 = 0) := by
    intro n hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ih
    cases' Nat.eq_zero_or_pos n with hn' hn' <;> simp_all [Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero]
    all_goals
      rcases Nat.even_or_odd n with ⟨m, rfl | rfl⟩ <;>
        simp_all [h₃, h₄, h₅, Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod, Nat.mod_mod]
    all_goals
      try
        { have := ih m (by omega)
          simp_all [Nat.digits_add, Nat.digits_mul, Nat.digits_one] }
  simp_all [h₆]
  decide

have h : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 1988, f n = n ↔ n.digits 2 = n.digits 2.reverse ∧ n.digits 2 ≠ [] := by
    intro n hn
    have hn' : 1 ≤ n ∧ n ≤ 1988 := Finset.mem_Icc.mp hn
    clear hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ihn
    rcases hn' with ⟨hn1, hn2⟩
    cases' n with n
    · exfalso; linarith
    · cases' n with n
      · simp [h₁]
      · cases' n with n
        · simp [h₂]
        · have h2n : 0 < n + 1 := by linarith
          have h2n1 : 0 < 2 * (n + 1) := by linarith
          have h2n2 : 0 < 2 * (n + 1) + 1 := by linarith
          have h2n3 : 0 < 4 * (n + 1) + 1 := by linarith
          have h2n4 : 0 < 4 * (n + 1) + 3 := by linarith
          cases' Nat.mod_two_eq_zero_or_one (n + 2) with hmod hmod
          · rw [← Nat.div_add_mod (n + 2) 2, hmod, Nat.mul_div_cancel _ (by decide)]
            simp [h₃, h2n1]
            exact ihn _ (by linarith) _ (by constructor <;> linarith)
          · cases' Nat.mod_two_eq_zero_or_one ((n + 2 - 1) / 2) with hmod2 hmod2
            · rw [← Nat.div_add_mod ((n + 2 - 1) / 2) 2, hmod2, Nat.mul_div_cancel _ (by decide)] at *
              simp_all [h₄, h₅, Nat.add_sub_cancel]
              omega
            · rw [← Nat.div_add_mod ((n + 2 - 1) / 2) 2, hmod2, Nat.mul_div_cancel _ (by decide)] at *
              simp_all [h₄, h₅, Nat.add_sub_cancel]
              omega
    simp_all
  have h2 : (Finset.filter (fun n => n.digits 2 = n.digits 2.reverse ∧ n.digits 2 ≠ []) (Finset.Icc 1 1988)).card = 92 := by
    rfl
  simp_all

    · cases' n with n

          apply ihn <;> omega
        · cases' n % 4 with r
          · have h₂ : n = 4 * (n / 4) := by omega
            rw [h₂, h₃] <;> try omega
            apply ihn <;> omega
          · cases' r with r
            · have h₂ : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 1 := by omega
              rw [h₂, h₄] <;> try omega
              apply ihn <;> omega
            · have h₂ : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 3 := by omega
              rw [h₂, h₅] <;> try omega
              apply ihn <;> omega
    simp_all
  simp_all [Finset.filter_eq']
  rfl

have h₆ : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 1988, f n = n ↔ n.digits 2 = List.reverse (n.digits 2) := by
    intro n hn
    have hn' : 1 ≤ n ∧ n ≤ 1988 := Finset.mem_Icc.mp hn
    clear hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ih
    cases' n with n
    · simp_all
    · cases' n with n
      · simp_all
      · cases' n % 2 with r
        · have : n = 2 * (n / 2) := by omega
          rw [this, h₃]
          simp_all [Nat.succ_le_iff, Nat.div_eq_of_lt]
        · cases' n % 4 with r
          · have : n = 4 * (n / 4) := by omega

          · cases' r with r

            · have : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 3 := by omega
              rw [this, h₅]

  rw [Finset.card_filter]
  have : (Finset.filter (fun n => n.digits 2 = List.reverse (n.digits 2)) (Finset.Icc 1 1988)).card = 92 := by

have h : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 1988, f n = n ↔ n.digits 2 = List.reverse (n.digits 2) := by
    intro n hn
    have hn' : 1 ≤ n ∧ n ≤ 1988 := Finset.mem_Icc.mp hn
    clear hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ihn
    rcases hn' with ⟨hn1, hn2⟩
    cases' n with n
    · exfalso; linarith
    · cases' n with n
      · simp [h₁]
      · cases' n % 2 with r
        · have : n.succ = 2 * ((n.succ) / 2) := by omega
          rw [this, h₃]
          · exact ihn ((n.succ) / 2) (by omega) (by omega)
          · omega
        · have : n.succ = 2 * ((n.succ) / 2) + 1 := by omega
          cases' (n.succ) / 2 % 2 with r'
          · have : n.succ = 4 * ((n.succ) / 4) + 1 := by omega
            rw [this, h₄]
            · simp [Nat.digits_add, Nat.digits_mul, Nat.digits_one]
              constructor <;> intro h <;> try simp_all [List.reverse_cons]
            · omega
          · have : n.succ = 4 * ((n.succ) / 4) + 3 := by omega
            rw [this, h₅]
            · simp [Nat.digits_add, Nat.digits_mul, Nat.digits_one]
              constructor <;> intro h <;> try simp_all [List.reverse_cons]
            · omega
    simp_all only [Finset.filter, Finset.Icc, Finset.card]
    have : (Finset.filter (fun n => n.digits 2 = List.reverse (n.digits 2)) (Finset.Icc 1 1988)).card = 92 := by
      decide
    exact this

have h : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 1988, f n = n ↔ n.digits 2 = n.digits 2.reverse ∧ n.digits 2 ≠ [] := by
    intro n hn
    have hn' : 1 ≤ n ∧ n ≤ 1988 := Finset.mem_Icc.mp hn
    clear hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ihn
    rcases n with (_ | _ | n) <;> simp_all [Nat.succ_le_iff, Nat.zero_lt_succ]
    all_goals
      try
        { cases' n with n
          all_goals simp_all [Nat.mul_succ, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm] }
    all_goals
      try
        { have := ihn _ (by omega)
          have := ihn _ (by omega)
          have := ihn _ (by omega)
          simp_all }
  simp_all only [Finset.card_filter, Finset.mem_Icc]
  decide

        · cases' n % 4 with r

have h₆ : ∀ n > 0, f n = n ↔ (∀ k, (Nat.digits 2 n).reverse.get? k = some 1 → k % 2 = 0) := by
    intro n hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ih
    cases' Nat.even_or_odd n with h h <;> simp_all [Nat.even_iff, Nat.odd_iff]
    all_goals
      try
        { cases' n with n <;> simp_all }
      try
        { cases' n with n <;> simp_all }
    all_goals
      try
        { omega }
  simp_all only [Finset.filter, Finset.Icc, Finset.mem_Icc, Finset.card]
  rfl

have h : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 1988, f n = n ↔ n.digits 2 = List.reverse (n.digits 2) := by
    intro n hn
    simp only [Finset.mem_Icc] at hn
    have h₁' : 1 ≤ n ∧ n ≤ 1988 := hn
    clear hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ih
    cases' n with n
    · exfalso
      linarith
    · cases' n with n
      · simp [h₁, h₂]
      · cases' n % 2 with r
        · have h₂' : n = 2 * (n / 2) := by omega
          rw [h₂', h₃]
          · exact ih _ (by omega)
          · omega
        · have h₂' : n = 2 * (n / 2) + 1 := by omega
          rw [h₂']
          cases' (n / 2) % 2 with r'
          · have h₃' : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 1 := by omega
            rw [h₃', h₄]
            · have h₄' : 2 * (n / 2) + 1 = 2 * (2 * (n / 4)) + 1 := by omega
              rw [h₄']
              have h₅' : n / 4 < n := by omega
              have h₆' : 2 * (n / 4) + 1 < n := by omega
              simp [ih h₅', ih h₆']
              omega
            · omega
          · have h₃' : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 3 := by omega
            rw [h₃', h₅]
            · have h₄' : 2 * (n / 2) + 1 = 2 * (2 * (n / 4) + 1) + 1 := by omega
              rw [h₄']
              have h₅' : n / 4 < n := by omega
              have h₆' : 2 * (n / 4) + 1 < n := by omega
              simp [ih h₅', ih h₆']
              omega
            · omega
    simp_all
  have h' : (Finset.filter (fun n => f n = n) (Finset.Icc 1 1988)).card =
      (Finset.filter (fun n => n.digits 2 = List.reverse (n.digits 2)) (Finset.Icc 1 1988)).card := by
    apply Finset.card_congr
    · intro x hx
      simp_all
    · intro x hx
      simp_all
    · intro x hx
      simp_all
    · intro x hx
      simp_all
  rw [h']
  decide

have h : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 1988, f n = n ↔ n.digits 2 = List.reverse (n.digits 2) := by
    intro n hn
    have hn' : 1 ≤ n ∧ n ≤ 1988 := Finset.mem_Icc.mp hn
    clear hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ih
    cases' n with n
    · simp_all
    · cases' n with n
      · simp_all
      · cases' n with n
        · simp_all
        · cases' n with n
          · simp_all
          · have : n + 2 > 0 := by linarith
            cases' Nat.mod_two_eq_zero_or_one (n + 2) with hmod hmod <;> simp_all [Nat.digits_add, Nat.digits_mul, Nat.digits_one]
              <;> try { omega }
              <;> try { rw [h₃] <;> apply ih <;> omega }
              <;> try { rw [h₄] <;> apply ih <;> omega }
              <;> try { rw [h₅] <;> apply ih <;> omega }
    simp_all
  simp_all only [Finset.filter_congr, Finset.card_filter]
  exact (by decide : (Finset.filter (fun n => n.digits 2 = List.reverse (n.digits 2)) (Finset.Icc 1 1988)).card = 92)

    intro n hn

    clear hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ih

    · cases' n with n
      · simp_all
      · cases' n % 2 with r
        · have : n = 2 * (n / 2) := by omega
          rw [this, h₃]
          · simp_all
          · omega
        · have : n = 2 * (n / 2) + 1 := by omega
          cases' (n / 2) % 2 with r'
          · have : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 1 := by omega
            rw [this, h₄]
            · simp_all
            · omega
          · have : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 3 := by omega
            rw [this, h₅]
            · simp_all
            · omega
    simp_all
  simp_all only [Finset.filter, Finset.Icc, Finset.card]

have h₆ : ∀ n > 0, f n = n ↔ (∀ k, (Nat.digits 2 n).reverse.get? k = some 1 → k % 2 = 0) := by
    intro n hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ih
    cases' Nat.even_or_odd n with h_even h_odd
    · obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := h_even
      have hm : 0 < m := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero fun h => by simp_all
      rw [h₃ m (by linarith)]
      simp [ih m (by linarith)]
      simp [Nat.digits_add_two_mul, Nat.digits_one]
      simp [List.reverse_cons, List.get?_cons, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
      omega
    · obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := h_odd
      have hm : 0 ≤ m := by linarith
      cases' Nat.even_or_odd m with h_even h_odd
      · obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := h_even
        have hk : 0 < k ∨ k = 0 := by omega
        cases' hk with hk hk
        · rw [h₄ k (by linarith)]
          have h₁ : 0 < 2 * k + 1 := by linarith
          have h₂ : 0 < k := by linarith
          rw [ih (2 * k + 1) (by linarith), ih k (by linarith)]
          simp [Nat.digits_add_two_mul, Nat.digits_one]
          simp [List.reverse_cons, List.get?_cons, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
          omega
        · simp_all
      · obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := h_odd
        have hk : 0 ≤ k := by linarith
        rw [h₅ k (by linarith)]
        have h₁ : 0 < 2 * k + 1 := by linarith
        have h₂ : 0 < k ∨ k = 0 := by omega
        cases' h₂ with h₂ h₂
        · rw [ih (2 * k + 1) (by linarith), ih k (by linarith)]
          simp [Nat.digits_add_two_mul, Nat.digits_one]
          simp [List.reverse_cons, List.get?_cons, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
          omega
        · simp_all
  simp_rw [h₆]
  exact (by decide)

have h : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 1988, f n = n ↔ n.digits 2 = List.reverse (n.digits 2) := by
    intro n hn
    have h₁' : 1 ≤ n ∧ n ≤ 1988 := Finset.mem_Icc.mp hn
    clear hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ihn
    cases' n with n
    · simp_all
    · cases' n with n
      · simp_all
      · cases' n % 2 with r
        · have h₂' : n = 2 * (n / 2) := by omega
          rw [h₂', h₃]
          · apply ihn
            omega
          · omega
        · have h₂' : n = 2 * (n / 2) + 1 := by omega
          cases' (n / 2) % 2 with r'
          · have h₃' : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 1 := by omega
            rw [h₃', h₄]
            · apply ihn
              omega
            · omega
          · have h₃' : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 3 := by omega
            rw [h₃', h₅]
            · apply ihn
              omega
            · omega
    simp_all
  simp_all only [Finset.filter_congr, Finset.card_filter]
  exact (by decide : (Finset.filter (fun n => n.digits 2 = List.reverse (n.digits 2)) (Finset.Icc 1 1988)).card = 92)

have h₆ : ∀ n > 0, f n = n ↔ (∀ k, (Nat.digits 2 n).get? k = some 1 → k % 2 = 0) := by
    intro n hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ihn
    rcases n with (_ | _ | n) <;> simp_all [Nat.digits_add, Nat.digits_mul_succ, Nat.digits_one]
    all_goals
      try
        { cases' Nat.even_or_odd n with h h <;>
          simp_all [Nat.even_iff, Nat.odd_iff, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt] }
    all_goals
      try
        { have h₁ := ihn (n / 2) (by omega)
          have h₂ := ihn ((n - 1) / 2) (by omega)
          have h₃ := ihn ((n - 3) / 2) (by omega)
          simp_all [Nat.div_eq_of_lt, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt] }
  simp_all only [Finset.filter, Finset.Icc, Finset.card]
  rfl

have h : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 1988, f n = n ↔ n.digits 2 = List.reverse (n.digits 2) := by
    intro n hn
    have hn' : 1 ≤ n ∧ n ≤ 1988 := Finset.mem_Icc.mp hn
    clear hn
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ihn
    rcases hn' with ⟨hn1, hn2⟩
    cases' n with n
    · contradiction
    · cases' n with n
      · simp_all
      · cases' n % 2 with r
        · have : n = 2 * (n / 2) := by omega
          rw [this, h₃] <;> try omega
          apply ihn <;> omega
        · cases' n % 4 with r
          · have : n = 4 * (n / 4) := by omega
            rw [this, h₃] <;> try omega
            apply ihn <;> omega
          · cases' r with r
            · have : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 1 := by omega
              rw [this, h₄] <;> try omega
              apply ihn <;> omega
            · have : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 3 := by omega
              rw [this, h₅] <;> try omega
              apply ihn <;> omega
  rw [Finset.filter_congr h]
  exact (by norm_num : (Finset.filter (fun n => n.digits 2 = List.reverse (n.digits 2)) (Finset.Icc 1 1988)).card = 92)
